title: Swords to Aether Spears
body:
# Spears

![The "Spears"](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/30100ceb3e550630a9eb18878f0c8f07de4dbe30.png)
This texture pack changes all swords into Aether spears. It keeps the look simple and clear, so it’s easy to use in game. Each sword is replaced with a spear, but everything else stays the same.

## suggestions
i suggest you use the "Small Held Items" resourcepack with this

**link**: https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/small-held-items/gallery

## Credits
full credits to the **Aether mod spears**
